scripts.start:b2c:full: concurrently "npm run start:b2c" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:checkout" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user"
scripts.start:b2b:full: concurrently "npm run start:b2b" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:checkout" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user"
scripts.start:admin:full: concurrently "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:user"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:b2c" "npm run start:b2b" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:checkout" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:b2c && npm run build:b2b && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:mfe: ng build shared && ng build product-mfe && ng build cart-mfe && ng build checkout-mfe && ng build order-mfe && ng build auth-mfe && ng build user-mfe && ng build ecommerce-app
